_doc: Per-PNG regions file. Lives as a sibling to the goal PNG (e.g. design/dashboard-home.png → design/dashboard-home.regions.json). Region descriptors are fractional (0..1) of the goal image's width/height so the same descriptor works at any resolution. Pad rects a few pixels around the element edge so shape probes have flat fill to scan. The assistant generates this file by Reading the goal PNG with the Read tool and identifying ~10-25 key visual components — the user does NOT author this by hand.
